name: S-3 coverage matrix records each cited section_id under the source's section_ids list per the architecture
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf '
rules:
  - {id: r, provenance: [{source: g, section_id: "5.2.1"}, {source: g, section_id: "6.3"}]}
' > tree/g/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/build-coverage-matrix.sh" --tree tree --emit m.json 2>err.txt && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("m.json","utf8"));const ids=j.sources.g.section_ids;process.exit(ids.includes("5.2.1")&&ids.includes("6.3")?0:1)' && echo recorded 1>&2
